name: TLA Path 4 — Idle Heartbeat + Hammerspoon Nudge

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ decision_text: `TLA-INVOCATION-PATH-4 nudge fired ${new Date().toISOString()} — phrase injected, pending_count=${$('sign-payload').first().json.pending_count}, urgent=${$('sign-payload').first().json.urgent}, idle_min=${$('sign-payload').first().json.idle_minutes.toFixed(1)}`, tags: ['tla-invocation-path-4', `path-4-ts-${$('sign-payload').first().json.ts}`, 'path-4-live'], project_source: 'titan', decision_type: 'execution', operator_id: 'OPERATOR_AMG' }) }}

meta.description: TLA v1.1 Path 4 idle-nudge: every 60s, polls Supabase for last Titan decision + pending queue + kill-switch. Fires HMAC-signed POST to Hammerspoon localhost (Mac :41710) when idle >=10 min + queue non-empty (or urgent). Logs every invocation to MCP op_decisions. Requires env: SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, TLA_NUDGE_HMAC_SECRET, TLA_NUDGE_ENDPOINT (if not default).
